reports under cover of Form 20-F or Form 40-F:

 Form 20-F
 &#120; &#8239;&#8239;&#8239;Form 40-F &#168; 

 EXPLANATORY NOTE 

 As an issuer listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, we are required
to submit with The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited a next day disclosure return form in
relation to the movements in our authorized issued shares or treasury shares as a result of or in connection with certain events (the
 " Next Day Disclosure Return ") pursuant to Rule 13.25A of the Hong Kong Listing Rules. We are furnishing our Next
Day Disclosure Return dated April 21, 2026 as Exhibit 99.1 of this Current Report on Form 6-K.

 2 

 EXHIBITS 

 Exhibit 99.1 &ndash; Next Day Disclosure Return with The Stock Exchange of Hong Kong Limited &ndash; Next Day Disclosure Return dated April 21, 2026 

 3 

 SIGNATURES 

 Pursuant to the requirements of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934,
the registrant has duly caused this report to be signed on its behalf by the undersigned, thereunto duly authorized.

 ALIBABA GROUP HOLDING LIMITED 

 Date: April 24, 2026
